---
title: "Templates"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Download ready-to-use templates for security policies, cloud configurations, project documentation, and technical planning."
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Resources</div>
    <h1>Templates</h1>
    <p>Ready-to-use templates for common business and technical documents.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Security & Compliance</h2>
    <p class="sub">Professional templates for security documentation.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security Policy">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Word &middot; PDF &middot; Markdown</div>
            <h3>Security Policy Template</h3>
            <p>Comprehensive security policy covering all major domains per ISO 27001.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Incident Response">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Word &middot; PDF &middot; Markdown</div>
            <h3>Incident Response Plan</h3>
            <p>Preparation, identification, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Risk Assessment">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Excel &middot; PDF</div>
            <h3>Risk Assessment Template</h3>
            <p>Risk identification, analysis, and treatment plans in a structured format.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Project Docs">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Word &middot; PDF &middot; Markdown</div>
            <h3>Project Documentation</h3>
            <p>Requirements, architecture, testing, and deployment sections.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Publishing templates</h2>
    <p class="sub">For academic and technical writing.</p>
    <div class="row g-4 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-5">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Quarto">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <h3>Quarto Manuscript</h3>
            <p>Technical papers and research with citations, code, and multi-format output.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-5">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative; opacity:0.6;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Typst">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <h3>Typst Technical Report</h3>
            <p>Modern typography and layout for technical reports. Coming soon.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:650px; text-align:center;">
    <h2>License</h2>
    <p style="color:#86868b;">All templates are provided under a <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/" target="_blank" class="m-lk" style="font-size:inherit;">Creative Commons Attribution 4.0</a> license. Use, modify, and distribute freely with attribution.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a custom template?</h2>
    <p>We create templates tailored to your organization's needs and branding.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Get in touch</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Custom branding &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Multiple formats &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free consultation
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
